changes.summary: The "Completed auctions report" link on the homepage auctions card now stays in one piece. It had been breaking mid-phrase — "Completed" clinging to the end of one line while "auctions report" dropped to the next — so the whole link now wraps to a fresh line together when it runs out of room.

The homepage heroes stopped whispering in daylight. In light mode, The League's What's New announcement hero and the AFL event hero had faded to pale, near-white washes that all but vanished against the page — every bit of drama was hoarded by dark mode. Now both wear a bold saturated card in every theme: The League's runs a deep league-blue gradient, the AFL's a rich navy with its gold accent word and red corner glow, white headline and all. The featured player still fades in from the right — bigger than ever, and finally with a stage worthy of the entrance.
